mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id != 0 AND menu_id IN ( SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId})

select DISTINCT m.* from sys_menu m inner join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id inner join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id inner join sys_user u on ur.user_id = u.user_id where m.parent_id = #{menuId} and u.username = #{userName} order by m.order_num

select DISTINCT m.* from sys_menu m inner join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id inner join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id inner join sys_user u on ur.user_id = u.user_id where m.parent_id = 0 and u.username = #{userName} order by m.order_num

select DISTINCT p.permission_code from sys_permission p inner join sys_role_permission rp on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id inner join sys_user_role ur on rp.role_id = ur.role_id inner join sys_user u on ur.user_id = u.user_id where u.username = #{userName} and p.status = 1
